name: Leshrac
description: Imbalance demands it. Leshrac, the Tormented Soul Leshrac, Tormented Soul, is an entity torn from the heart of nature, a liminal being that exists half in one plane of existence, half in another. His penetrating intelligence is such that he can never ignore for a moment the agonizing horror at the heart of all creation.

abilities.name: Defilement
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus area-of-effect per current. Radius Bonus per Int: 0.7.

abilities.name: Split Earth
abilities.description: Deals damage and stuns enemy units for a short duration within the area-targeted location. Cast Range: 650. Base Radius: 150/170/190/210. Number of Instances: 1 (3). Damage: 115/170/225/280. Stun Duration: 1.7. Radius Increase per Instance: (55). Cooldown: 80/100/120/140.

abilities.name: Diabolic Edict
abilities.description: Deals pure damage within the radius. The lesser the enemy units, the more the damage dealt to those units. Radius: 450. Number of Explosions: 40 (60). Damage Interval: 0.2 (0.13). Damage per Explosion: 9/16/23/30. Duration: 8. Building Damage Factor: 1. Cooldown: 22/21/20/19. Mana Cost: 90/120/150/180.

abilities.name: Lightning Storm
abilities.description: Summons a lightning storm that damages the unit-targeted enemy, then jumps to nearby enemy units. Applies a movement speed slow to all affected enemy units. Cast Range: 600. Jump Radius: 450. Number of Jumps: 5/7/9/11. Damage: 90/140/190/240 (170/220/270/320). Move Speed Slow: 75%. Slow Duration: 0.45/0.7/0.95/1.2. Cooldown: 80/100/120/140.

abilities.name: Nihilism
abilities.description: Grants Leshrac bonus movement speed while active, without reducing his magic resistance. When it serves his purpose, Leshrac briefly reduces his presence in the Terrene Plane. Effect Radius: 500. Magic Resist Reduction: 30%. Move Speed Slow: 30%. Ethereal Duration: 4. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Self Move Speed Bonus: 30%. Mana Cost: 25.

abilities.name: Pulse Nova
abilities.description: Deals damage per second within the radius centered around Leshrac once toggled on. Drains Leshrac's mana per second toggled on. Effect Radius: 500. Damage per Second: 80/135/180 (110/165/210). Damage Reduction: (10%). Cooldown: 25/45/65.
